center.id: loc-里奧蘇西奧-卡爾達斯省-699c2ec8
center.name: 里奧蘇西奧 (卡爾達斯省)
center.summary: 里奧蘇西奧 (卡爾達斯省)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括黄耳鹦哥，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The number of mature individuals in the population is 212, though it is thought that there is a total of 1,408 individuals in the wild. It is also found in Riosucio, Caldas in Colombia
